hero.subtitle: The structured recruitment platform bridging India's finest engineering talent with Japan's leading companies. From

marquee.tagline: Trusted by leading organizations across Japan

about.label: About Us
about.body1: Job-O-Hire was born from a simple observation: Japan faces a critical workforce shortage with ~789,000 IT professionals needed by 2030, while India produces the world's largest pool of skilled engineering graduates seeking global opportunities.
about.body2: We bridge this gap with a structured recruitment platform that connects pre-screened, curated talent from India's premier institutions — IITs, NITs, BITS, and more — directly with verified employers in Japan and beyond. Our focus on early-career hiring, from internships to full-time roles, ensures quality placements that benefit both talent and companies.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: A Broken Hiring Pipeline
problem.subtitle_start: Japan's Ministry of Economy projects a
problem.subtitle_end: . Existing platforms fail both sides of the equation.
japan_items: Aging population causing critical workforce shortage
Limited access to verified global talent pools
No platform specializing in early talent hiring
High cost and time for international recruitment
india_items: Limited visibility into global career opportunities
Flooded with fake or irrelevant job listings
Lack of college T&P cell integration with employers
No focus on curated, pre-screened early careers

solution.label: Our Solution
solution.title: India-Japan Talent Bridge
solution.subtitle: A dual-sided platform connecting curated Indian talent with verified global employers

features.title: Pre-Screened Talent Pool
features.desc: Curated candidates from IITs, NITs, IIITs, BITS, and select premier institutions. Quality over quantity.

features.title: Internship → Full-Time
features.desc: Structured conversion pathway from internships to permanent roles. Companies hire with measurable confidence.

features.title: College T&P Integration
features.desc: Direct connection with Training & Placement cells of premium institutions for trusted hiring at scale.

features.title: Verified Opportunities
features.desc: Eliminates fake or irrelevant job listings. Every opportunity is authenticated, vetted, and real.

features.title: Skill + Project Evaluation
features.desc: Candidates assessed on skills and real projects, not just resumes. Strong emphasis on motivation & culture fit.

features.title: Language Flexibility
features.desc: Japanese language optional and company-defined. Designed for seamless cross-cultural collaboration.

audience.label: Who It's For
audience.title: A Dual-Side Platform
talent_items: IIT, NIT, IIIT, BITS & select premier colleges
employer_items: HR teams seeking efficient early-talent pipelines
Companies looking for verified, job-ready candidates

whyUs.label: Why Job-O-Hire
whyUs.subtitle: Inspired by platforms like Tech Japan and Talendy, but built to be more scalable, more focused, and more impactful across industries.

features.title: Focused on Early-Career Hiring
features.desc: Designed specifically for pre-final & final-year talent — not generic job seekers. We understand the student lifecycle.

features.title: Structured Conversion Pipeline
features.desc: Internship → full-time pathways with clear metrics. Companies hire with confidence through proven evaluation.

features.title: Deep Institutional Integration
features.desc: Direct partnerships with college T&P cells ensure trusted, verified hiring at scale. No middlemen.

features.title: Zero Tolerance for Fake Listings
features.desc: Every opportunity is vetted and authenticated. Students see only real, relevant positions from verified employers.

features.title: Skills & Projects Over Resumes
features.desc: Evaluation based on real work, motivation statements, and culture fit — not just keywords on paper.
